title: cotoneaster incanus
intro: Cotoneaster incanus, also known as the hoary cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions in China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cotoneaster incanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster incanus typically involve drying the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
